items.name: Dating Platform
items.description: An online connection and dating system that helps users find and match based on recommendation algorithms and real-time interaction. It is optimized for high concurrency and personal data security.

items.name: HRM System
items.description: A comprehensive HR management solution for enterprises, digitalizing employee profiles, timekeeping, payroll, and automating internal mail/notification workflows to optimize operations.

items.name: MinuteMind
items.description: A productivity and focus tool applying the Pomodoro technique. It allows automatic configuration of countdown cycles (e.g., 60-min focus, 5-10 min break), triggers reminder notifications, and tracks work analytics to sustain concentration and minimize distractions.
